scientific_answer_battery.intent: Evaluate whether an agent can plan and execute small comparative MD studies, extract quantitative evidence, and answer a scientific question with calibrated confidence.

study_evidence_bundle.intent: Evaluate whether an agent can package an auditable MD study plan, methods draft, provenance, decision log, and evidence report.

notes: Study-level suite in the MDAgentBench benchmark family.
Tasks focus on scientific question answering and auditable study bundles, not system preparation alone.
Preparation-only workflow tasks live in MDPrepBench.
